This analysis also provides empirical support for the **omnigenic model**: each significant gene set is associated with many distinct peripheral gene perturbations, rather than being regulated by only a few specific genes.

Key comparison with Ota et al.: of 13 Ota et al. MCH-pathway genes in our 1,297-gene test set (CLSPN, SPRED2, CAD, POLE, CBFA2T3, CCNA2, KLF1, EIF3F, CALR, EIF2B4, ABCB10, ATR, SYMPK), **11 are identified as significant peripheral genes by OPERA**, and many appear as members of the significant gene-set modules.

```{r}

filtered_list_50 <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_50_0.01_2_0.5.rds")
genewise_p_value <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/repologle_MCH/flames+200kb/K50/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/genewise_p_value.rds")
genewise_p_value[genewise_p_value==0] <- 1e-100


# ============================================================
# Step 1: 找 key SNPs（与 >5 个 module 有联系的 SNP）
# ============================================================

snp_module_count <- dfl2 %>%
  group_by(snp) %>%
  summarise(n_modules = n_distinct(module)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_modules))

key_snps <- snp_module_count %>%
  filter(n_modules > 0) %>%
  pull(snp)

# 报告比例
total_snps <- n_distinct(dfl2$snp)
n_key_snps <- length(key_snps)

cat("Key SNPs数量:", n_key_snps, "\n")
cat("总SNP数量:", total_snps, "\n")
cat("Key SNP比例:", round(n_key_snps / total_snps * 100, 2), "%\n")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 对每个 key SNP，找联系的 module，再找 module 中的基因
# 然后做 Bonferroni 校正，统计 significant genes
# ============================================================

# genewise_p_value 格式：行是 SNP，列是 gene
# 先转成长格式方便操作
p_long <- genewise_p_value %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%
  pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "gene_id", values_to = "p_value")

# Bonferroni 校正阈值（按每个 snp-module 组合的基因数校正）
library(qvalue)

results_list <- list()
pval_list    <- list()   # 新增：储存每个 snp-module 的 p value 向量

# 设为 NULL 则计算所有 guide；设为具体 guide ID 则只计算该 guide
target_guide <- c("gRNA:ENSG00000145191","gRNA:ENSG00000184634","gRNA:ENSG00000196396","gRNA:ENSG00000196367","gRNA:ENSG00000088930")
if (!is.null(target_guide)) key_snps <- intersect(key_snps, target_guide)

for (i in seq_along(key_snps)) {
  s <- key_snps[i]
  cat(sprintf("Processing SNP %d/%d: %s\n", i, length(key_snps), s))
  
  modules_for_snp <- dfl2 %>%
    filter(snp == s) %>%
    pull(module) %>%
    unique()
  
  for (m in modules_for_snp) {
    genes_in_module <- filtered_list_50[[m]]
    if (is.null(genes_in_module) || length(genes_in_module) == 0) next
    
    p_subset <- p_long %>%
      filter(snp == s, gene_id %in% genes_in_module) %>%
      filter(!is.na(p_value))
    if (nrow(p_subset) == 0) next
    
    key <- paste(s, m, sep = "_")
    
    # ── 原有：计算 pi1 ──────────────────────────────────────
    pi1_val <- tryCatch({
      qobj <- qvalue(p = p_subset$p_value)
      1 - qobj$pi0
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    
    results_list[[key]] <- data.frame(
      snp               = s,
      module            = m,
      n_genes_in_module = nrow(p_subset),
      pi1               = round(pi1_val, 4)
    )
    
    # ── 新增：保存 p value 向量 ──────────────────────────────
    pval_list[[key]] <- p_subset %>%
      dplyr::select(gene_id, p_value)          # 保留基因名，方便后续对照
  }
}

results_df  <- bind_rows(results_list)

# pval_df：长格式，包含 snp、module、gene_id、p_value 四列
pval_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(pval_list), function(k) {
    parts <- strsplit(k, "_")[[1]]
    # key 格式是 "snp_module"，snp 本身可能含下划线，所以用 results_df 对应
    pval_list[[k]] %>%
      mutate(snp_module_key = k)
  })
) %>%
  left_join(
    results_df %>% dplyr::select(snp, module) %>%
      mutate(snp_module_key = paste(snp, module, sep = "_")),
    by = "snp_module_key"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(snp, module, gene_id, p_value)


```



```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

plot_guide_heatmap <- function(guide_id, pval_df) {
  
  df <- pval_df %>% filter(snp == guide_id)
  
  all_genes   <- unique(df$gene_id)
  all_modules <- unique(df$module)
  
  # 构建完整 module x gene 矩阵
  full_df <- expand.grid(module = all_modules, gene_id = all_genes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    left_join(df %>% dplyr::select(module, gene_id, p_value), by = c("module", "gene_id")) %>%
    mutate(has_value = !is.na(p_value))
  
  # ── 基因排序：按 module membership 聚集 ──────────────────
  # 每个 gene 的"primary module"= 它出现在哪些 module 里
  # 策略：先按 module 数量分组，再按最小 p_value 的 module 排序
gene_order <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%           # 先去掉 NA
    mutate(p_value = as.numeric(p_value)) %>%  # 确保是 numeric，不是 list
    group_by(gene_id) %>%
    slice_min(p_value, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # 替换 arrange + slice(1)
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(module, p_value) %>%
    pull(gene_id)
  
  # 有些 gene 可能只在 full_df 里（expand.grid 补全的），补到末尾
  remaining_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, gene_order)
  gene_order_full <- c(gene_order, remaining_genes)
  
  # ── Module 排序：按各自基因数量降序 ──────────────────────
  module_order <- df %>%
    group_by(module) %>%
    summarise(n_genes = n_distinct(gene_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(n_genes)) %>%
    pull(module)
  
  # 应用排序
  full_df <- full_df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_id = factor(gene_id, levels = gene_order_full),
      module  = factor(module,  levels = module_order)
    )
  
  # ── 添加 module 分隔线位置 ────────────────────────────────
  # 统计每个 module 在 x 轴上占据的基因位置，画竖线分隔
  module_boundaries <- df %>%
    mutate(gene_id = factor(gene_id, levels = gene_order_full)) %>%
    group_by(module) %>%
    summarise(
      max_pos = max(as.integer(gene_id), na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(max_pos) %>%
    # 边界线画在每个 module 最后一个基因之后 0.5 处
    mutate(xintercept = max_pos + 0.5) %>%
    filter(xintercept < length(gene_order_full) + 0.5)  # 去掉最右边界
  
  ggplot(full_df, aes(x = gene_id, y = module)) +
    geom_tile(data = filter(full_df, !has_value), fill = "grey92", color = NA) +
    geom_tile(data = filter(full_df, has_value),  aes(fill = p_value), color = NA) +
    # module 分隔竖线
    geom_vline(
      data        = module_boundaries,
      aes(xintercept = xintercept),
      color       = "grey40",
      linewidth   = 0.4,
      linetype    = "dashed",
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low      = "red",
      high     = "white",
      limits   = c(0, 1),
      name     = "p-value",
      na.value = "grey92"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Guide:", guide_id),
      x     = "Gene (ordered by module membership)",
      y     = "Module"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )
}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

plot_module_qqplot <- function(guide_id, pval_df) {
  
  df <- pval_df %>% filter(snp == guide_id)
  
  all_modules <- unique(df$module)
  
  # 为每个 module 生成 QQ plot 数据
  qq_df <- lapply(all_modules, function(mod) {
    p_vals <- df %>%
      filter(module == mod) %>%
      pull(p_value) %>%
      na.omit() %>%
      sort()
    
    n <- length(p_vals)
    if (n == 0) return(NULL)
    
    expected <- -log10((seq_len(n)) / (n + 1))
    observed <- -log10(p_vals)
    
    data.frame(
      module   = mod,
      expected = expected,
      observed = observed
    )
  }) %>%
    bind_rows()
  
  # 计算 lambda 和 pi1 per module
  stats_df <- df %>%
    group_by(module) %>%
    summarise(
      p_vals = list(na.omit(p_value)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      n = length(p_vals),
      
      # lambda：基因组膨胀因子，用 p-value 对应的卡方统计量中位数估算
      lambda = ifelse(
        n > 1,
        round(
          median(qchisq(p_vals, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE), na.rm = TRUE) /
            qchisq(0.5, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
          3
        ),
        NA_real_
      ),
      
      # pi1：真实信号比例 = 1 - pi0
      # 用 Storey 方法估算 pi0：在 p > lambda_thresh 区域，p-value 近似均匀分布
      # pi0 ≈ #{p > 0.5} / (n * 0.5)，lambda_thresh 取 0.5
      pi1 = ifelse(
        n > 1,
        round(
          1 - sum(p_vals > 0.5) / (n * 0.5),
          3
        ),
        NA_real_
      ),
      pi1 = pmax(0, pmin(1, pi1)),   # 截断到 [0, 1]
      
      label = paste0("λ = ", lambda, "\nπ₁ = ", pi1)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # 把 label 加入 qq_df 用于 facet 内标注
  label_df <- qq_df %>%
    group_by(module) %>%
    summarise(
      x_pos = 0,
      y_pos = max(observed, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(stats_df %>% dplyr::select(module, label), by = "module")
  
  ggplot(qq_df, aes(x = expected, y = observed)) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1,
                color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_text(
      data    = label_df,
      aes(x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label),
      hjust   = 0, vjust = 1,
      size    = 2.8, color = "black",
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ module, scales = "free") +
    labs(
      title = paste("QQ Plot by Module — Guide:", guide_id),
      x     = expression(Expected ~ -log[10](p)),
      y     = expression(Observed ~ -log[10](p))
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      panel.grid  = element_blank(),
      axis.line   = element_line(color = "grey50"),
      plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )
}

```

```{r}
plot_guide_heatmap("gRNA:ENSG00000184634", pval_df)
plot_module_qqplot("gRNA:ENSG00000184634", pval_df)
plot_guide_heatmap("gRNA:ENSG00000196367", pval_df)
plot_module_qqplot("gRNA:ENSG00000196367", pval_df)
plot_guide_heatmap("gRNA:ENSG00000088930", pval_df)
plot_module_qqplot("gRNA:ENSG00000088930", pval_df)
plot_guide_heatmap("gRNA:ENSG00000196396", pval_df)
plot_module_qqplot("gRNA:ENSG00000196396", pval_df)
plot_guide_heatmap("gRNA:ENSG00000145191", pval_df)
plot_module_qqplot("gRNA:ENSG00000145191", pval_df)
```


```{r,include=F}

results_key <- results_df %>%
  filter(snp %in% key_snps, !is.na(pi1))

pi1_all <- results_df$pi1[!is.na(results_df$pi1)]
pi1_key <- results_key$pi1

# 先画 all SNPs（freq=FALSE 直接输出密度，不要手动改 $density）
hist(pi1_all,
     breaks = 200,
     freq   = FALSE,
     col    = rgb(0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 0.5),
     border = NA,
     xlim   = c(0, 1),
     xlab   = "Pi1",
     ylab   = "Density",
     main   = "Pi1 distribution: all SNPs vs key SNPs")

# 叠加 key SNPs
hist(pi1_key,
     breaks = 200,
     freq   = FALSE,
     col    = rgb(0.9, 0.3, 0.2, 0.5),
     border = NA,
     add    = TRUE)

legend("topright",
       legend = c("All peripheral genes", "Key peripheral genes (>5 modules)"),
       fill   = c(rgb(0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 0.5),
                  rgb(0.9, 0.3, 0.2, 0.5)),
       border = NA,
       bty    = "n")
```






## Negative control: non-targeting perturbations

To assess calibration of the mediation framework, we repeat the full pipeline using **514 non-targeting perturbations** from the Replogle dataset. Non-targeting perturbations do not disrupt any gene, so they should not exhibit systematic associations with MCH. The resulting 24,158 negative-control (perturbation, gene-set, MCH) triples serve as an empirical null.

Under a 5% FDR threshold applied to the AdaFilter decisions from this negative-control run, only 18 pairs (0.07%) are called significant — demonstrating excellent calibration and strong control of false positives across the full pipeline.

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# Non-targeting perturbation IDs are indexed from grna_names.rds
# using the logical vector in non_targeting_guide.rds
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/MCH/MCH_summary.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Repologle_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/grna_names.rds")[readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/non_targeting_guide.rds")]



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/repologle/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_50_0.01_2_0.5.rds")




# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "(?<=\\()[^()]+(?=\\))")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- sub("^gRNA:", "", gene_symbol)
  # print(target_name)
  # print(pairs_df$grna_target)

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Repologle_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Repologle_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed, 
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Repologle_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)


```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# Load the same OPERA p-value matrix used for the primary MCH analysis.
# For the negative control we use only the non-targeting rows (snp_geneset_p_value_control).
snp_geneset_p_value<- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/repologle_MCH/flames+200kb/K50/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("ENSG",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("non",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_control %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher, everything())

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]

library(adaFilter)

result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.05)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

head(merged[merged$decision==1,])
```

# Asthma analysis (Nadig dataset)

The same three-stage mediation framework is applied to **asthma** (GWAS: GCST010043) using the **Nadig** Perturb-seq dataset (T cells). GWAS loci were mapped to candidate effector genes using both a 200 kb window and FLAMES, yielding **75 asthma-relevant perturbations**.

Topic modeling was applied to perturbation-receiving cells (split-sample design as for MCH), and the resulting gene sets were used as candidate mediators. Because the Nadig dataset is smaller and from a different cell type (immune rather than erythroid), a different optimal number of topics (K = 20 or K = 10/15 for different locus-mapping strategies) was used. The analysis demonstrates that the framework generalizes across traits with distinct genetic architectures, perturbation coverage scales, and cellular contexts.

## Asthma, FLAMES / 200 kb locus mapping, K = 20

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames_200kb/de_20_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

 de_10_0.01_2_0.5 <-gene_modules_id

gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)



# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names


# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query   = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values,
    sig     = significant       # significant 列也是 list，记录每个 geneset 是否显著
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value, sig) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig == TRUE)  

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")



# 注意！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！是按 1， 10 ，11 等排序
```

```{r}
top10_names

```




### Geneset–trait associations and AdaFilter mediation test (Asthma, K20, flames_200kb)

Same pipeline as MCH: Fisher aggregation of gene-level asthma burden-test p-values within topic modules (with cis-gene exclusion), joined to OPERA gene→gene-set p-values, and tested jointly with AdaFilter. Note: `alpha=0.1` is used here given the smaller number of perturbations (75 vs. 1,297 for MCH), which reduces statistical power.

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames_200kb/Nadig_associated_perturbation_flames_200kb.rds")



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames_200kb/de_20_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

all_measured_genes <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/all_measured_genes.rds")

# 只保留测到的 genes
gene_modules_id <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(vec) intersect(vec, all_measured_genes))


# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "(?<=\\()[^()]+(?=\\))")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- paste0("tar-",gene_symbol)

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
# module_results %>%
#   arrange(p_fisher) %>%
#   print(n = 30)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Nadig_asthma/flames_200kb/K20/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]

library(adaFilter)

result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.1)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

head(merged[merged$decision==1,])
```



```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=15}

dfl2 <- merged[merged$decision==1,]
dfl2$gene_name <- dfl2$snp

```


```{r}
result <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames_200kb/result.rds")
symbol_to_rsid <- result %>%         # 你的 1251×7 表
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, rsid) %>%
  distinct()

# ── 2. 把 rsid 加入 tbl_df ───────────────────────────────
tbl_with_rsid <- dfl2 %>%
  left_join(symbol_to_rsid, by = c("snp" = "symbol"))

# ── 3. 按 rsid 分组合并 ──────────────────────────────────
# 没有 rsid 匹配的行（rsid = NA）保持原样，snp 不变
merged_df <- tbl_with_rsid %>%
  group_by(rsid, module) %>%
  mutate(
    merged_snp = ifelse(
      all(is.na(rsid)),
      snp,
      paste0(
        paste(sort(unique(snp)), collapse = "-"),
        " (", rsid[!is.na(rsid)][1], ")"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(merged_snp, module) %>%
  summarise(
    snp_geneset   = min(snp_geneset,   na.rm = TRUE),
    geneset_trait = min(geneset_trait, na.rm = TRUE),
    decision      = max(decision,      na.rm = TRUE),
    gene_name     = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = "-"),
    .groups       = "drop"
  ) 

merged_df$gene_name <- merged_df$merged_snp
```


```{r}
head(merged_df)
```


```{r}
flames_symbols <- result %>%
  filter(source == "FLAMES") %>%
  pull(symbol) %>%
  unique() %>%
  na.omit()

# 检查 merged_df 的 snp 列中是否包含这些 symbol
# merged_snp 格式如 "RPS18-SLC39A7 (rs411919)"，需要拆解出 symbol 部分
highlight_genes <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    sapply(merged_snp, function(s) {
      # 提取括号前的 symbol 部分，按 "-" 拆分
      sym_part <- sub("\\s*\\(.*\\)$", "", s)       # 去掉 " (rsXXX)"
      syms     <- strsplit(sym_part, "-")[[1]]       # 拆分多个 symbol
      any(syms %in% flames_symbols)                  # 任一 symbol 在 FLAMES 中
    })
  )

cat("FLAMES_gene 行数:", nrow(highlight_genes), "\n")
print(highlight_genes)
```




```{r,fig.width=14,fig.height=14}

plot_gene_module_network2(
  merged_df,
  top_n_gene = 200,
  size_scale = 1,
  highlight_genes = character(0),
    highlight_mod = character(0),

  layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
)
```

# Asthma, FLAMES + 200 kb combined locus mapping

In this section, GWAS loci are mapped using the union of FLAMES fine-mapping and a 200 kb genomic window. 3 values of K (10, 15 ,20 topics) are tested to assess robustness of the results to the number of latent topics. The downstream pipeline (GO enrichment → Fisher aggregation → AdaFilter → network visualization) is identical to the MCH analysis.

## K = 10 topics

### GO enrichment

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_10_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

 de_10_0.01_2_0.5 <-gene_modules_id

gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)



# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names


# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query   = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values,
    sig     = significant       # significant 列也是 list，记录每个 geneset 是否显著
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value, sig) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig == TRUE)  

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")



# 注意！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！是按 1， 10 ，11 等排序
```

```{r}
top10_names
```

### Geneset–trait associations and AdaFilter mediation test (Asthma, K10, flames+200kb)

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/Nadig_associated_perturbation_flames_200kb.rds")



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_10_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

all_measured_genes <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/all_measured_genes.rds")

# 只保留测到的 genes
gene_modules_id <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(vec) intersect(vec, all_measured_genes))


# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "(?<=\\()[^()]+(?=\\))")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- paste0("tar-",gene_symbol)

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
# module_results %>%
#   arrange(p_fisher) %>%
#   print(n = 30)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Nadig_asthma/flames+200kb/K10/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]

library(adaFilter)

result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.1)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

head(merged[merged$decision==1,])
```



```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=15}

dfl2 <- merged[merged$decision==1,]
dfl2$gene_name <- dfl2$snp
# plot_gene_module_network2(
#   dfl2,
#   top_n_gene = 300,
#   size_scale = 1,
#   highlight_genes = character(0),
#     highlight_mod = character(0),
#   gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,   # <- 传入
# 
#   layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
# )


```


```{r}
result <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/result.rds")
symbol_to_rsid <- result %>%         # 你的 1251×7 表
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, rsid) %>%
  distinct()

# ── 2. 把 rsid 加入 tbl_df ───────────────────────────────
tbl_with_rsid <- dfl2 %>%
  left_join(symbol_to_rsid, by = c("snp" = "symbol"))

# ── 3. 按 rsid 分组合并 ──────────────────────────────────
# 没有 rsid 匹配的行（rsid = NA）保持原样，snp 不变
merged_df <- tbl_with_rsid %>%
  group_by(rsid, module) %>%
  mutate(
    merged_snp = ifelse(
      all(is.na(rsid)),
      snp,
      paste0(
        paste(sort(unique(snp)), collapse = "-"),
        " (", rsid[!is.na(rsid)][1], ")"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(merged_snp, module) %>%
  summarise(
    snp_geneset   = min(snp_geneset,   na.rm = TRUE),
    geneset_trait = min(geneset_trait, na.rm = TRUE),
    decision      = max(decision,      na.rm = TRUE),
    gene_name     = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = "-"),
    .groups       = "drop"
  ) 

merged_df$gene_name <- merged_df$merged_snp
```






```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# 1. 从result提取rsid的位置信息
result_pos <- result %>%
  dplyr::select(rsid, locations) %>%
  separate(locations, into = c("chr", "pos"), sep = ":", convert = TRUE) %>%
  distinct(rsid, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 2. 从merged_snp提取rsid（括号内的rs号）
merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(snp_rsid = str_extract(merged_snp, "rs\\d+"))

# 3. 给merged_df加上位置信息
merged_with_pos <- merged_df %>%
  left_join(result_pos, by = c("snp_rsid" = "rsid"))

# 4. 计算每对merged_snp与result中所有rsid的距离，找最小值
# 先获取result所有位置
result_all_pos <- result_pos %>%
  rename(ref_chr = chr, ref_pos = pos)

distance_result <- merged_with_pos %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    min_distance = {
      current_chr <- chr
      current_pos <- pos
      current_rsid <- snp_rsid
      
      others <- merged_with_pos %>% 
        filter(chr == current_chr,
               snp_rsid != current_rsid)
      
      if (nrow(others) == 0) NA_real_
      else min(abs(others$pos - current_pos))
    },
    closest_snp = {
      current_chr <- chr
      current_pos <- pos
      current_rsid <- snp_rsid
      
      others <- merged_with_pos %>% 
        filter(chr == current_chr,
               snp_rsid != current_rsid)
      
      if (nrow(others) == 0) NA_character_
      else others$merged_snp[which.min(abs(others$pos - current_pos))]
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

distance_result %>%
  dplyr::select(merged_snp, chr, pos, closest_snp, min_distance) %>%
  arrange(min_distance)
```



```{r}
flames_symbols <- result %>%
  filter(source == "FLAMES") %>%
  pull(symbol) %>%
  unique() %>%
  na.omit()

# 检查 merged_df 的 snp 列中是否包含这些 symbol
# merged_snp 格式如 "RPS18-SLC39A7 (rs411919)"，需要拆解出 symbol 部分
highlight_genes <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    sapply(merged_snp, function(s) {
      # 提取括号前的 symbol 部分，按 "-" 拆分
      sym_part <- sub("\\s*\\(.*\\)$", "", s)       # 去掉 " (rsXXX)"
      syms     <- strsplit(sym_part, "-")[[1]]       # 拆分多个 symbol
      any(syms %in% flames_symbols)                  # 任一 symbol 在 FLAMES 中
    })
  )

cat("FLAMES_genes 行数:", nrow(highlight_genes), "\n")
print(highlight_genes)
```


### dandelion plot


```{r,fig.width=14,fig.height=14}

plot_gene_module_network2(
  merged_df,
  top_n_gene = 200,
  size_scale = 1,
  highlight_genes = character(0),
    highlight_mod = character(0),
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,   # <- 传入


  layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
)
```



## K = 15 topics

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_15_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

 de_10_0.01_2_0.5 <-gene_modules_id

gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)



# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names


# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query   = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values,
    sig     = significant       # significant 列也是 list，记录每个 geneset 是否显著
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value, sig) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig == TRUE)  

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")



# 注意！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！是按 1， 10 ，11 等排序
```



### Geneset–trait associations and AdaFilter mediation test (Asthma, K15, flames+200kb)




```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/Nadig_associated_perturbation_flames_200kb.rds")



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_15_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

all_measured_genes <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/all_measured_genes.rds")

# 只保留测到的 genes
gene_modules_id <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(vec) intersect(vec, all_measured_genes))


# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "(?<=\\()[^()]+(?=\\))")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- paste0("tar-",gene_symbol)

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
module_results %>%
  arrange(p_fisher) %>%
  print(n = 30)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Nadig_asthma/flames+200kb/K15/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]

library(adaFilter)

result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.1)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

merged[merged$decision==1,]
```



```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=15}

dfl2 <- merged[merged$decision==1,]
dfl2$gene_name <- dfl2$snp
plot_gene_module_network2(
  dfl2,
  top_n_gene = 200,
  size_scale = 1,
  highlight_genes = character(0),
    highlight_mod = character(0),
  gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,   # <- 传入

  layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
)
```
```{r}
result <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/result.rds")
symbol_to_rsid <- result %>%         # 你的 1251×7 表
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, rsid) %>%
  distinct()

# ── 2. 把 rsid 加入 tbl_df ───────────────────────────────
tbl_with_rsid <- dfl2 %>%
  left_join(symbol_to_rsid, by = c("snp" = "symbol"))

# ── 3. 按 rsid 分组合并 ──────────────────────────────────
# 没有 rsid 匹配的行（rsid = NA）保持原样，snp 不变
merged_df <- tbl_with_rsid %>%
  group_by(rsid, module) %>%
  mutate(
    merged_snp = ifelse(
      all(is.na(rsid)),
      snp,
      paste0(
        paste(sort(unique(snp)), collapse = "-"),
        " (", rsid[!is.na(rsid)][1], ")"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(merged_snp, module) %>%
  summarise(
    snp_geneset   = min(snp_geneset,   na.rm = TRUE),
    geneset_trait = min(geneset_trait, na.rm = TRUE),
    decision      = max(decision,      na.rm = TRUE),
    gene_name     = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = "-"),
    .groups       = "drop"
  ) 

merged_df$gene_name <- merged_df$merged_snp
```


```{r}
merged_df
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# 1. 从result提取rsid的位置信息
result_pos <- result %>%
  dplyr::select(rsid, locations) %>%
  separate(locations, into = c("chr", "pos"), sep = ":", convert = TRUE) %>%
  distinct(rsid, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 2. 从merged_snp提取rsid（括号内的rs号）
merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(snp_rsid = str_extract(merged_snp, "rs\\d+"))

# 3. 给merged_df加上位置信息
merged_with_pos <- merged_df %>%
  left_join(result_pos, by = c("snp_rsid" = "rsid"))

# 4. 计算每对merged_snp与result中所有rsid的距离，找最小值
# 先获取result所有位置
result_all_pos <- result_pos %>%
  rename(ref_chr = chr, ref_pos = pos)

distance_result <- merged_with_pos %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    min_distance = {
      current_chr <- chr
      current_pos <- pos
      current_rsid <- snp_rsid
      
      others <- merged_with_pos %>% 
        filter(chr == current_chr,
               snp_rsid != current_rsid)
      
      if (nrow(others) == 0) NA_real_
      else min(abs(others$pos - current_pos))
    },
    closest_snp = {
      current_chr <- chr
      current_pos <- pos
      current_rsid <- snp_rsid
      
      others <- merged_with_pos %>% 
        filter(chr == current_chr,
               snp_rsid != current_rsid)
      
      if (nrow(others) == 0) NA_character_
      else others$merged_snp[which.min(abs(others$pos - current_pos))]
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

distance_result %>%
  dplyr::select(merged_snp, chr, pos, closest_snp, min_distance) %>%
  arrange(min_distance)
```


```{r}
flames_symbols <- result %>%
  filter(source == "FLAMES") %>%
  pull(symbol) %>%
  unique() %>%
  na.omit()

# 检查 merged_df 的 snp 列中是否包含这些 symbol
# merged_snp 格式如 "RPS18-SLC39A7 (rs411919)"，需要拆解出 symbol 部分
highlight_genes <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    sapply(merged_snp, function(s) {
      # 提取括号前的 symbol 部分，按 "-" 拆分
      sym_part <- sub("\\s*\\(.*\\)$", "", s)       # 去掉 " (rsXXX)"
      syms     <- strsplit(sym_part, "-")[[1]]       # 拆分多个 symbol
      any(syms %in% flames_symbols)                  # 任一 symbol 在 FLAMES 中
    })
  )

cat("FLAMES_genes 行数:", nrow(highlight_genes), "\n")
print(highlight_genes)
```

### dandelion plot



```{r,fig.width=14,fig.height=14}

plot_gene_module_network2(
  merged_df,
  top_n_gene = 200,
  size_scale = 1,
  highlight_genes = character(0),
    highlight_mod = character(0),
  gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,   # <- 传入

  layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
)
```


## K=20

### GO enrichment

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_20_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

 de_10_0.01_2_0.5 <-gene_modules_id

gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)



# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names


# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query   = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values,
    sig     = significant       # significant 列也是 list，记录每个 geneset 是否显著
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value, sig) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig == TRUE)  

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")



# 注意！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！是按 1， 10 ，11 等排序
```

```{r}
top10_names
```



### Geneset–trait associations and AdaFilter mediation test (Asthma, K20, flames+200kb)


```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/Nadig_associated_perturbation_flames_200kb.rds")



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_20_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

all_measured_genes <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/Nadig/all_measured_genes.rds")

# 只保留测到的 genes
gene_modules_id <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(vec) intersect(vec, all_measured_genes))


# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "(?<=\\()[^()]+(?=\\))")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- paste0("tar-",gene_symbol)

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
# module_results %>%
#   arrange(p_fisher) %>%
#   print(n = 30)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/Nadig_asthma/flames+200kb/K20/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("non-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]

library(adaFilter)

result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.1)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

head(merged[merged$decision==1,])
```


```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=15}

dfl2 <- merged[merged$decision==1,]
dfl2$gene_name <- dfl2$snp

```
```{r}
result <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/result.rds")
symbol_to_rsid <- result %>%         # 你的 1251×7 表
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, rsid) %>%
  distinct()

# ── 2. 把 rsid 加入 tbl_df ───────────────────────────────
tbl_with_rsid <- dfl2 %>%
  left_join(symbol_to_rsid, by = c("snp" = "symbol"))

# ── 3. 按 rsid 分组合并 ──────────────────────────────────
# 没有 rsid 匹配的行（rsid = NA）保持原样，snp 不变
merged_df <- tbl_with_rsid %>%
  group_by(rsid, module) %>%
  mutate(
    merged_snp = ifelse(
      all(is.na(rsid)),
      snp,
      paste0(
        paste(sort(unique(snp)), collapse = "-"),
        " (", rsid[!is.na(rsid)][1], ")"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(merged_snp, module) %>%
  summarise(
    snp_geneset   = min(snp_geneset,   na.rm = TRUE),
    geneset_trait = min(geneset_trait, na.rm = TRUE),
    decision      = max(decision,      na.rm = TRUE),
    gene_name     = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = "-"),
    .groups       = "drop"
  ) 

merged_df$gene_name <- merged_df$merged_snp
```


```{r}
head(merged_df)
```


```{r}
flames_symbols <- result %>%
  filter(source == "FLAMES") %>%
  pull(symbol) %>%
  unique() %>%
  na.omit()

# 检查 merged_df 的 snp 列中是否包含这些 symbol
# merged_snp 格式如 "RPS18-SLC39A7 (rs411919)"，需要拆解出 symbol 部分
highlight_genes <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    sapply(merged_snp, function(s) {
      # 提取括号前的 symbol 部分，按 "-" 拆分
      sym_part <- sub("\\s*\\(.*\\)$", "", s)       # 去掉 " (rsXXX)"
      syms     <- strsplit(sym_part, "-")[[1]]       # 拆分多个 symbol
      any(syms %in% flames_symbols)                  # 任一 symbol 在 FLAMES 中
    })
  )

cat("FLAMES_genes 行数:", nrow(highlight_genes), "\n")
print(highlight_genes)
```




```{r,fig.width=14,fig.height=14}

plot_gene_module_network2(
  merged_df,
  top_n_gene = 200,
  size_scale = 1,
  highlight_genes = character(0),
    highlight_mod = character(0),
  gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,   # <- 传入

  layout_fun = igraph::layout_with_fr   # 关键：显式用 igraph 的
)
```

# Asthma_CDT4

## GO enrichment

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)
 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/CDT4/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_50_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

 de_10_0.01_2_0.5 <-gene_modules_id

gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5, function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# gene_sets <- lapply(de_10_0.01_2_0.5 , function(x) unique(as.character(x)))

# 建议给每个 set 一个名字（没有就补上）
if (is.null(names(gene_sets))) names(gene_sets) <- paste0("set_", seq_along(gene_sets))

res <- gost(
  query = gene_sets,                 # list of 100 gene vectors
  organism = "hsapiens",
  multi_query = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr",
  user_threshold = 0.05,
  sources = c("GO:BP","GO:MF","KEGG")
)



# geneset 名字：如果你有 gene_sets 的 names 就用它；否则自动生成
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names)) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_along(res$result$significant[[1]]))

# GO term 名字：用 term_id 或 term_name（建议 term_id 更稳定）
go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_id)
# 如果你更想用可读名字：
# go_names <- paste0(res$result$source, ":", res$result$term_name)

# 1) list -> 矩阵：每列一个 term，每行一个 geneset
sig_term_by_set <- do.call(cbind, res$result$significant)
storage.mode(sig_term_by_set) <- "logical"

# 2) 转成“geneset(行) × term(列)”的 index matrix
idx_mat <- sig_term_by_set  # 现在行=geneset, 列=term（通常就是这个方向）
rownames(idx_mat) <- gs_names
colnames(idx_mat) <- go_names


# 如果你发现方向反了（极少数情况），就用这一句修正：
# idx_mat <- t(idx_mat)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

go_tbl <- as_tibble(res$result)

# geneset 名称（如果你有 names(gene_sets) 就用它；否则自动生成）
G <- length(go_tbl$p_values[[1]])
gs_names <- names(gene_sets)
if (is.null(gs_names) || length(gs_names) != G) gs_names <- paste0("set_", seq_len(G))

# 展开：term × geneset 的长表
go_long <- go_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    query   = list(gs_names),
    p_value = p_values,
    sig     = significant       # significant 列也是 list，记录每个 geneset 是否显著
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(source, term_id, term_name, query, p_value, sig) %>%
  unnest(c(query, p_value, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig == TRUE)  

# 每个 geneset 取 top10（p_value 最小）
top10_tbl <- go_long %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 你想要的：每个 geneset 的 top10 term_name（以及可选的 p_value）
top10_names <- top10_tbl %>%
  group_by(query) %>%
  summarise(top10_term_name = list(term_name), .groups = "drop")



# 注意！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！是按 1， 10 ，11 等排序
```

```{r,eval=F}
library(openxlsx)
wb <- createWorkbook()
for (q in sort(unique(top10_tbl$query))) {
  df_sheet <- top10_tbl %>%
    filter(query == q) %>%
    dplyr::select(term_name, p_value) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  addWorksheet(wb, q)
  writeData(wb, q, df_sheet)
}
saveWorkbook(wb, "/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/GO_terms_pvalue_athma_CD4_k50.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

```{r,eval=F}
## K20
top10_names[11,2][[1]]
```
```{r,eval=F}
top10_names[37,2][[1]]
```

## Geneset–trait associations and AdaFilter mediation test (Asthma, K50, flames+200kb)

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/CDT4_associated_perturbation.rds")



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/CDT4/standard_input_format_asthma/flames+200kb/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/CDT4/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_50_0.01_2_0.5.rds")

# gene_modules_id<-filtered_list_2


# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "^[^(]+")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- gene_symbol

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
module_results %>%
  arrange(p_fisher) %>%
  print(n = 10)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/CDT4_asthma/flames+200kb/K50_optimized/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("NTC-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("NTC-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

library(adaFilter)

module_sizes <- lengths(gene_modules_id)
merged <- merged %>% filter(module_sizes[module] > 1)

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]
result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.15)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

dfl2<-merged[merged$decision==1,]
```


The chunk below maps significant peripheral gene IDs (ENSG format from OPERA row names) back to gene symbols, and clusters them by genomic locus (200 kb window) so that co-located genes at the same GWAS locus are grouped together in downstream visualizations.

```{r}
# 0. ENSG -> symbol mapping from GTF
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/protein_coding_genes/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.112.gtf.gz",
                            feature.type = "gene")
gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)[, c("gene_id", "gene_name")]
colnames(gtf_df) <- c("ensg", "symbol")
ensg_to_symbol <- setNames(gtf_df$symbol, gtf_df$ensg)

# 1. Build rsid -> cluster_id: merge GWAS loci within 200kb on the same chromosome
gwas_result <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/GWAS/asthma/GCST010043/flames+200kb/result.rds")

rsid_locations <- gwas_result %>%
  dplyr::select(rsid, locations) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(locations)) %>%
  mutate(
    chr = sub(":.*", "", locations),
    # suppressWarnings: non-autosomal (X/Y/MT) or malformed entries produce NA,
    # which are removed by the chr filter below — this is expected
    pos = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sub(".*:", "", locations)))
  ) %>%
  filter(chr %in% as.character(1:22)) %>%
  arrange(chr, pos) %>%
  group_by(chr) %>%
  mutate(cluster_num = cumsum(c(1, diff(pos) > 200000))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cluster_id = paste0(chr, "_", cluster_num)) %>%
  dplyr::select(rsid, chr, pos, cluster_id)

# 2. symbol -> rsid mapping from gwas_result (bridge: ENSG -> symbol -> rsid)
symbol_to_rsid <- gwas_result %>%
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, rsid) %>%
  distinct()

tbl <- dfl2 %>%
  mutate(symbol = snp) %>%
  # many-to-many is expected: one gene can be near multiple GWAS loci (multiple rsids),
  # and the same gene can appear in multiple modules. Rows are collapsed in step 4
  # by group_by(module, cluster_id).
  left_join(symbol_to_rsid, by = "symbol", relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  left_join(rsid_locations %>% dplyr::select(rsid, cluster_id), by = "rsid") %>%
  mutate(cluster_id = ifelse(is.na(cluster_id), paste0("solo_", ensg), cluster_id))

# 4. Within each module, find connected components of a gene–cluster bipartite graph.
#    Two genes (or two clusters) end up in the same component if they are bridged by a
#    shared gene or a shared cluster anywhere in the chain — enabling transitive merging.
#    e.g. gene1↔cluster_A, gene1↔cluster_B  →  gene1 + all genes in cluster_B form one row.
library(igraph)

merged_df <- tbl %>%
  group_by(module) %>%
  group_modify(function(df, key) {
    # Build bipartite edges: gene node  <->  cluster node
    # Use ENSG as fallback node label when symbol is missing
    edges <- df %>%
      transmute(
        gene_node    = paste0("g:", ifelse(!is.na(symbol), symbol, ensg)),
        cluster_node = paste0("c:", cluster_id)
      ) %>%
      distinct()

    g    <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(edges, directed = FALSE)
    comp <- igraph::components(g)$membership          # named vector: node -> comp_id

    # Map each row back to its component via the cluster node
    node_comp <- tibble(node = names(comp), comp_id = as.integer(comp))

    df %>%
      left_join(
        node_comp %>%
          filter(startsWith(node, "c:")) %>%
          transmute(cluster_id = sub("^c:", "", node), comp_id),
        by = "cluster_id"
      ) %>%
      group_by(comp_id) %>%
      summarise(
        snp_geneset      = min(snp_geneset,   na.rm = TRUE),
        geneset_trait    = min(geneset_trait, na.rm = TRUE),
        merged_gene_name = paste(sort(unique(symbol[!is.na(symbol)])), collapse = "-"),
        merged_loci      = paste(sort(unique(rsid[!is.na(rsid)])),     collapse = "-"),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(-comp_id)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    summary = paste0(merged_gene_name, "(", merged_loci, ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(module, merged_gene_name, merged_loci, summary)

head(merged_df)
```


## Gene–module network visualization

```{r plot-asthma-network-fn, include=FALSE}
# ── Simplified network plot (no biological colour coding) ────────────────────
plot_gene_module_network_asthma <- function(df12,
                                            top_n_per_module = NULL,
                                            top_n_gene       = 600,
                                            pcap             = 1e-300,
                                            layout_fun       = NULL,
                                            out_pdf          = NULL,
                                            width            = 12, height = 9,
                                            label_genes      = TRUE,
                                            label_modules    = TRUE,
                                            size_scale       = 0.7,
                                            mod_size_range   = c(15, 40),
                                            gene_size_range  = c(4,  20)) {

  if (is.null(layout_fun)) layout_fun <- igraph::layout_with_fr

  node_gene_col   <- "#AED6F1"   # light blue  – peripheral gene/locus nodes
  node_module_col <- "#D5D8DC"   # light grey  – module nodes

  # ── data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  d <- df12 %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      module = as.character(module),
      gene   = as.character(merged_gene_name),
      p_snp  = pcap,
      p_mod  = pcap
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(module), !is.na(gene)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(module, gene) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(p_snp = min(p_snp, na.rm = TRUE),
                     p_mod = min(p_mod, na.rm = TRUE),
                     .groups = "drop")

  if (!is.null(top_n_per_module)) {
    d <- d %>%
      dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(p_snp, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n_per_module) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  if (!is.null(top_n_gene)) {
    top_genes <- d %>%
      dplyr::group_by(gene) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(best_p = min(p_snp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(best_p) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n_gene) %>%
      dplyr::pull(gene)
    d <- d %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% top_genes)
  }

  mod_tbl <- d %>%
    dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(p_mod = min(p_mod, na.rm = TRUE),
                     n_assoc = dplyr::n_distinct(gene), .groups = "drop")

  gene_tbl <- d %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gene) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(p_snp = min(p_snp, na.rm = TRUE),
                     n_assoc = dplyr::n_distinct(module), .groups = "drop")

  vertices <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    mod_tbl  %>% dplyr::transmute(name = module, type = "module", weight = n_assoc),
    gene_tbl %>% dplyr::transmute(name = gene,   type = "gene",   weight = n_assoc)
  )

  edges <- d %>% dplyr::transmute(from = module, to = gene, p_snp = p_snp)

  g <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(edges, directed = FALSE, vertices = vertices)

  igraph::V(g)$shape       <- ifelse(igraph::V(g)$type == "module", "square", "circle")
  igraph::V(g)$frame.color <- NA
  igraph::V(g)$label.color <- "black"
  igraph::V(g)$color       <- ifelse(igraph::V(g)$type == "module",
                                     node_module_col, node_gene_col)

  mod_ids  <- which(igraph::V(g)$type == "module")
  gene_ids <- which(igraph::V(g)$type == "gene")

  igraph::V(g)$size <- rep(NA_real_, igraph::vcount(g))

  mod_w  <- igraph::V(g)$weight[mod_ids]
  igraph::V(g)$size[mod_ids] <- if (length(unique(mod_w)) == 1) {
    rep(mean(mod_size_range) * size_scale, length(mod_ids))
  } else {
    scales::rescale(mod_w, to = mod_size_range * size_scale)
  }

  gene_w <- igraph::V(g)$weight[gene_ids]
  igraph::V(g)$size[gene_ids] <- if (length(unique(gene_w)) == 1) {
    rep(mean(gene_size_range) * size_scale, length(gene_ids))
  } else {
    scales::rescale(gene_w, to = gene_size_range * size_scale)
  }

  igraph::E(g)$color <- "grey70"
  igraph::E(g)$width <- 1

  igraph::V(g)$label     <- NA_character_
  igraph::V(g)$label.cex <- ifelse(igraph::V(g)$type == "module", 0.9, 0.7)
  if (label_modules) igraph::V(g)$label[mod_ids]  <- igraph::V(g)$name[mod_ids]
  if (label_genes)   igraph::V(g)$label[gene_ids] <- igraph::V(g)$name[gene_ids]

  lay <- layout_fun(g)
  if (!is.null(out_pdf)) grDevices::pdf(out_pdf, width = width, height = height)
```
