```{r plot-asthma-network-fn, include=FALSE}
  plot(g, layout = lay, vertex.label.dist = 0, edge.curved = 0)

  usr    <- graphics::par("usr")
  x_left <- usr[1] + 0.02 * (usr[2] - usr[1])
  y_bot  <- usr[3] + 0.02 * (usr[4] - usr[3])
  graphics::legend(
    x = x_left, y = y_bot, xjust = 0, yjust = 0,
    legend = c("Module", "Gene/locus"),
    pt.bg  = c(node_module_col, node_gene_col),
    col    = c(node_module_col, node_gene_col),
    pch    = c(15, 19),
    pt.cex = 2,
    cex    = 1.1,
    bty    = "o", box.col = "grey30", bg = "white"
  )

  if (!is.null(out_pdf)) grDevices::dev.off()
  invisible(g)
}

# ── Simplified ego plot (no biological colour coding) ────────────────────────
plot_module_ego_asthma <- function(focal_module,
                                   df12,
                                   geneset_categories = NULL,
                                   gene_size      = 10,
                                   focal_size     = 30,
                                   other_mod_size = 22,
                                   label_genes    = TRUE,
                                   label_cex      = 0.75) {

  node_gene_col   <- "#AED6F1"   # light blue  – peripheral gene/locus nodes
  node_module_col <- "#D5D8DC"   # light grey  – module nodes

  focal_rows <- df12 %>% dplyr::filter(module == focal_module)
  if (nrow(focal_rows) == 0) {
    message("No genes for module: ", focal_module)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  other_mod_rows <- df12 %>%
    dplyr::filter(merged_gene_name %in% focal_rows$merged_gene_name,
                  module != focal_module) %>%
    dplyr::select(module, merged_gene_name) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

  focal_v <- data.frame(name = focal_module, vtype = "focal_module",
                         gene_raw = NA_character_, gene_loci = NA_character_,
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  gene_v <- focal_rows %>%
    dplyr::transmute(name = summary, vtype = "gene",
                     gene_raw = merged_gene_name, gene_loci = merged_loci)

  other_v <- other_mod_rows %>%
    dplyr::distinct(module) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(name = module, vtype = "other_module",
                     gene_raw = NA_character_, gene_loci = NA_character_)

  verts <- dplyr::bind_rows(focal_v, gene_v, other_v)

  edges_focal_gene <- focal_rows %>%
    dplyr::transmute(from = focal_module, to = summary)

  edges_gene_other <- other_mod_rows %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      focal_rows %>% dplyr::select(merged_gene_name, summary),
      by = "merged_gene_name", relationship = "many-to-many"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(from = summary, to = module) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

  all_edges <- dplyr::bind_rows(edges_focal_gene, edges_gene_other)

  g <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(all_edges, directed = FALSE, vertices = verts)

  is_module_node <- igraph::V(g)$vtype %in% c("focal_module", "other_module")
  igraph::V(g)$shape       <- ifelse(is_module_node, "square", "circle")
  igraph::V(g)$frame.color <- NA
  igraph::V(g)$label.color <- "black"
  igraph::V(g)$color       <- ifelse(is_module_node, node_module_col, node_gene_col)
  igraph::V(g)$size        <- ifelse(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "focal_module", focal_size,
                                      ifelse(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "other_module",
                                             other_mod_size, gene_size))

  igraph::V(g)$label <- vapply(seq_len(igraph::vcount(g)), function(i) {
    vt <- igraph::V(g)$vtype[i]
    nm <- igraph::V(g)$name[i]
    if (vt == "focal_module") nm
    else if (vt == "other_module") NA_character_
    else if (label_genes) igraph::V(g)$gene_raw[i]
    else NA_character_
  }, character(1))

  igraph::V(g)$label.cex <- ifelse(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "focal_module", 0.85,
                                    ifelse(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "other_module", 0.7,
                                           label_cex))

  igraph::E(g)$color <- "grey70"
  igraph::E(g)$width <- 1

  # ── concentric layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  focal_idx <- which(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "focal_module")
  gene_idx  <- which(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "gene")
  other_idx <- which(igraph::V(g)$vtype == "other_module")
  n_genes   <- length(gene_idx)
  n_others  <- length(other_idx)

  lay <- matrix(0, nrow = igraph::vcount(g), ncol = 2)
  lay[focal_idx, ] <- c(0, 0)

  if (n_genes > 0) {
    th <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = n_genes + 1)[seq_len(n_genes)]
    lay[gene_idx, 1] <- cos(th)
    lay[gene_idx, 2] <- sin(th)
  }

  if (n_others > 0) {
    gene_angles <- setNames(atan2(lay[gene_idx, 2], lay[gene_idx, 1]),
                             igraph::V(g)$name[gene_idx])
    other_names <- igraph::V(g)$name[other_idx]
    for (j in seq_along(other_idx)) {
      connected_summaries <- other_mod_rows %>%
        dplyr::filter(module == other_names[j]) %>%
        dplyr::left_join(focal_rows %>% dplyr::select(merged_gene_name, summary),
                         by = "merged_gene_name") %>%
        dplyr::pull(summary)
      valid_angles <- gene_angles[intersect(connected_summaries, names(gene_angles))]
      mean_angle <- if (length(valid_angles) > 0)
        atan2(mean(sin(valid_angles)), mean(cos(valid_angles)))
      else
        2 * pi * (j - 1) / n_others
      lay[other_idx[j], 1] <- 2 * cos(mean_angle)
      lay[other_idx[j], 2] <- 2 * sin(mean_angle)
    }
  }

  # per-node label placement: gene labels point outward
  n_v        <- igraph::vcount(g)
  lbl_dist   <- rep(0.5, n_v)
  lbl_degree <- rep(-pi / 2, n_v)
  for (i in seq_len(n_v)) {
    if (igraph::V(g)$vtype[i] == "gene") {
      lbl_degree[i] <- atan2(lay[i, 2], lay[i, 1])
      lbl_dist[i]   <- 1.5
    }
  }
  igraph::V(g)$label.dist   <- lbl_dist
  igraph::V(g)$label.degree <- lbl_degree

  cat_label <- if (!is.null(geneset_categories)) {
    cat_row <- geneset_categories[geneset_categories[[1]] == focal_module, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(cat_row) > 0 && !is.na(cat_row[[2]][1]) && nzchar(cat_row[[2]][1]))
      cat_row[[2]][1]
    else
      NA_character_
  } else NA_character_

  main_title <- if (!is.na(cat_label))
    paste0("Module ", focal_module, "\n", cat_label)
  else
    paste0("Module ", focal_module)

  plot(g, layout = lay, main = main_title, edge.curved = 0.2)

  legend(
    "bottomright",
    legend = c("Module", "Gene/locus"),
    pt.bg  = c(node_module_col, node_gene_col),
    col    = "black",
    pch    = c(22, 21),
    pt.cex = 1.6,
    bty    = "n", cex = 0.8
  )

  invisible(g)
}
```

```{r plot-asthma-network, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
plot_gene_module_network_asthma(
  df12      = merged_df,
  top_n_gene = 800
)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
geneset_categories <- read_excel("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/mediation_analysis/asthma/K50/geneset_categories.xlsx")
```


```{r plot-asthma-ego, fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
setwd("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/mediation_analysis/asthma/K50")
for (mod in sort(unique(merged_df$module))) {
  plot_module_ego_asthma(
    focal_module       = mod,
    df12               = merged_df,
    geneset_categories = geneset_categories
  )
  pdf(paste0("asthma_ego_", mod, ".pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
  plot_module_ego_asthma(
    focal_module       = mod,
    df12               = merged_df,
    geneset_categories = geneset_categories
  )
  dev.off()
}
```





### modules most related to asthma

```{r}
target_modules <- c("k9", "k20", "k24", "k25", "k28", "k32", "k35")

merged_sub <- merged %>% filter(module %in% target_modules)

X_sub <- merged_sub[, c("snp_geneset", "geneset_trait")]
result_sub <- adaFilter(X_sub, r = 2, alpha = 0.1)

merged_sub$decision <- result_sub$decision

merged_sub[merged_sub$decision == 1, ]
```

### modules related to immune

```{r}
target_modules <- c(  "k5", "k7", "k8", "k9", "k10", "k12", "k13",
  "k20", "k21", "k24", "k25", "k26", "k28",
  "k32", "k33", "k34", "k35", "k40", "k42",
  "k46", "k47")

merged_sub <- merged %>% filter(module %in% target_modules)

X_sub <- merged_sub[, c("snp_geneset", "geneset_trait")]
result_sub <- adaFilter(X_sub, r = 2, alpha = 0.1)

merged_sub$decision <- result_sub$decision

merged_sub[merged_sub$decision == 1, ]
```
```{r}
x<-merged[merged$decision==1,]
length(unique(x$module))
table(x$module)
```

### NTC


```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(heavytailcombtest)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Read inputs
# -----------------------------
df <- fread("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/geneset_to_trait/asthma/asthma.tsv")
df2 <- df[grepl("M1.01", df$Name), ]

Nadig_associated_perturbation <- rownames(snp_geneset_p_value_control)



discovery_pairs_cis <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/CDT4/standard_input_format_asthma/flames+200kb/discovery_pairs_cis.rds")


 gene_modules_id <- readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/Getting_started/data/CDT4/topic_geneset/flames+200kb/de_50_0.01_2_0.5.rds")




# -----------------------------
# 1) Build pv_map from df2
# -----------------------------
gene_id <- str_extract(df2$Name, "^[^(]+")

lookup <- df2 %>%
  mutate(ID = gene_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID), !is.na(p_value)) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(p_value = min(p_value), .groups = "drop")

pv_map <- setNames(lookup$p_value, lookup$ID)


# -----------------------------
# 2) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_p <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p[is.na(p) | p <= 0] <- NA
  p
}

safe_comb <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  combination.test(
    p,
    weights = NA,
    method = "Cauchy",
    tail.idx = 1
  )
}

safe_comb_fisher <- function(p) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]
  if (length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (length(p) == 1) return(p)

  stat <- -2 * sum(log(p))
  stats::pchisq(stat, df = 2 * length(p), lower.tail = FALSE)
}


# -----------------------------
# 3) Make filtered modules per perturbation (and record n_removed)
# -----------------------------
make_filtered_modules <- function(gene_symbol, gene_modules_id, pairs_df) {
  target_name <- gene_symbol

  ids_to_remove <- unique(pairs_df$response_id[pairs_df$grna_target == target_name])

  filtered_modules <- lapply(gene_modules_id, function(mod_ids) {
    setdiff(mod_ids, ids_to_remove)
  })

  list(
    modules   = filtered_modules,
    n_removed = length(ids_to_remove)
  )
}

filtered_by_perturbation <- setNames(
  lapply(
    Nadig_associated_perturbation,
    make_filtered_modules,
    gene_modules_id = gene_modules_id,
    pairs_df = discovery_pairs_cis
  ),
  Nadig_associated_perturbation
)


# -----------------------------
# 4) Compute module-level combined p-values per perturbation
#    (and add n_removed into module_results)
# -----------------------------
compute_for_one_pert <- function(pert) {
  obj <- filtered_by_perturbation[[pert]]
  gene_modules_id_pert <- obj$modules
  n_removed <- obj$n_removed

  # module -> p-values vector under this perturbation
  module_pvals <- lapply(gene_modules_id_pert, function(genes) {
    p <- pv_map[genes]
    names(p) <- genes
    p[!is.na(p)]
  })

  # combine within each module
  p_acat <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb(p))
  })

  p_fisher <- map_dbl(module_pvals, ~ {
    p <- clean_p(.x)
    if (!length(p)) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(safe_comb_fisher(p))
  })

  tibble(
    snp       = pert,
    n_removed = n_removed,  # ✅ 每个 perturbation 的 ids_to_remove 数量（复制到每一行 module）
    module    = names(module_pvals),
    n_genes   = lengths(gene_modules_id_pert),
    n_matched = sapply(module_pvals, function(v) sum(!is.na(v))),
    p_acat    = p_acat,
    p_fisher  = p_fisher
  )
}

module_results <- map_dfr(Nadig_associated_perturbation, compute_for_one_pert)

# 查看结果
module_results %>%
  arrange(p_fisher) %>%
  print(n = 10)


library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

snp_geneset_p_value<-  readRDS("/project/xuanyao/jiaming/paper/output/snake/CDT4_asthma/flames+200kb/K50/3000_t_ACAT_resample/p_values/geneset_p_value.rds")
snp_geneset_p_value_test <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(!grepl("NTC-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]
snp_geneset_p_value_control <- snp_geneset_p_value[which(grepl("NTC-",rownames(snp_geneset_p_value))),]

df1_long <- snp_geneset_p_value_control %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%      # 这里真正把 rownames 变成一列 snp
  pivot_longer(
    -snp,
    names_to  = "module",
    values_to = "p_snp_geneset"
  )

## 2. 模块层面的表，只保留需要的列
df2 <- module_results %>%
  dplyr::select(module, p_fisher,snp)

## 3. 按 module 合并，再调整列顺序
merged <- df1_long %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("snp", "module")) %>%  # 关键改动
  relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)%>% tidyr::drop_na()


# library(dplyr)
# 
# df1 <- as.data.frame(snp_geneset_p_value)
# df1$snp <- rownames(df1)
# 
# df1_long <- df1 %>%
#   pivot_longer(-snp, names_to = "module", values_to = "p_snp_geneset")
# 
# ## 图二：geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001（列：module, p_acat）
# df2 <- geneset_acat_pvals_M1.0001 %>%
#   dplyr::select(module, p_fisher)
# 
# merged <- df1_long %>%
#   left_join(df2, by = "module") %>%
#   relocate(snp, module, p_snp_geneset, p_fisher)
# 
# 

library(adaFilter)

module_sizes <- lengths(gene_modules_id)
merged <- merged %>% filter(module_sizes[module] > 1)

X <- merged[,c(3,4)]
result <- adaFilter(X, r = 2,alpha=0.15)

merged$decision <- result$decision
colnames(merged)[c(3,4)] <- c("snp_geneset","geneset_trait")

merged[merged$decision==1,]
```
